---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability for lazy-harness
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who hits it? Be specific — "users want
X" is weaker than "I hit X while doing Y in situation Z". Concrete stories
beat abstract nice-to-haves. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- The capability you want. What does it look like from the user's
perspective? Sketch the CLI, config, or behaviour if you can. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why you think this one is
better. This is the most important section for non-trivial requests —
the maintainer will weigh this against the committed themes in
`docs/roadmap.md` and the `What NOT to do` rules in `CLAUDE.md`
(especially "no abstractions for hypothetical future needs"). -->

## Relation to the roadmap

<!-- Does this fit an existing theme in `docs/roadmap.md`? Does it
conflict with one? Is it entirely outside the current roadmap? Either
answer is fine — the question helps frame whether it is a scope
expansion or a scope fit. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, links to similar features in other tools, relevant
ADRs, anything that helps the maintainer decide. -->
